Well, let's get started!

dev-to-top.description:
Quando comecei a ir a eventos de tecnologia, estava na faculdade e ia a todos os gratuitos ou que custavam, no máximo, 100 reais. Porém, eu estava começando em TI e sabia tão pouco sobre a área em que eu queria atuar, logo qualquer evento despertava minha curiosidade.

Os anos passaram e eu me torne

dev-to-top.author: Ben Halpern

dev-to-top.title: my ai coding session burns more power than the average nigerian gets all day.
dev-to-top.description:
I run Claude Code most of my day. agent loops firing all day, one after another. the usage screen tells me I'm at 26% of my weekly limit. it doesn't tell me what that 26% weighs anywhere else. it feels free.

It isn't.

A single chat reply costs about 0.3 watt-hours — the energy an LED bulb burns in
dev-to-top.author: Daniel Nwaneri
